title: Fort Collins Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Fort Collins with a Z-Score of +3.17. This event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Fort Collins is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 11%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 13.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
